name: amae
description: Autonomous Marketing Agentic Engine — mines audience pain language, generates campaigns, files PRs weekly

scripts.intelligence: node agents/copy-excavator.js && node agents/timing-scout.js && node agents/competitor-autopsist.js && node agents/audience-locator.js && node agents/hook-miner.js && node agents/objection-mapper.js && node agents/intelligence-synthesizer.js
scripts.campaign: node agents/memory-parser.js && node agents/memory-agent.js && node agents/intel-agent.js && node agents/strategy-agent.js && node agents/funnel-router.js && node agents/content-factory.js && node agents/guardrail-agent.js && node agents/content-mirror-agent.js
scripts.media: node agents/image-generator.js && node agents/voice-generator.js && node agents/video-producer.js
scripts.evolution: node agents/scout-agent.js && node agents/twin-agent.js && node agents/evolution-agent.js
scripts.test:reddit: node --input-type=module -e "import { fetchSubreddit } from './lib/reddit-api.js'; fetchSubreddit('sideproject').then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r.slice(0,2), null, 2)));"
scripts.test:openrouter: node --input-type=module -e "import { callModel, MODELS } from './lib/openrouter.js'; callModel([{role:'user',content:'reply with: working'}], MODELS.FAST, 50).then(console.log);"
scripts.test:ideogram: node --input-type=module -e "import { generateImage } from './lib/ideogram-api.js'; generateImage('A simple test image', '1:1').then(r => console.log('Ideogram OK:', r?.url ?? 'no url'));"
